# Vendored third-party libraries

## konva.min.js

- **Version:** Konva 9.3.16
- **License:** MIT
- **Source:** https://unpkg.com/konva@9.3.16/konva.min.js
- **Project:** https://konvajs.org/
- **Repo:** https://github.com/konvajs/konva
- **Vendored:** 2026-05-23
- **Why vendored locally:** the research annotator must work offline and without runtime CDN dependency.

To upgrade: re-download from unpkg, replace the file, verify size + first chars look like the existing file, and note the new version here.
